query_params.name: task_id
query_params.label: task_id
query_params.desc: The task_id returned by the asynchronous API.

response_fields.name: task_status
response_fields.desc: Asynchronous task status. 0: The task is queued. 1: Asynchronous processing. 2: Processing was successful.

body_params.name: cloth_class
body_params.label: cloth_class
body_params.desc: Clothing categories. Multiple values can be submitted at once, separated by commas (,). tops: Tops. coat: Coat. skirt: Skirt. pants: Pants. bag: Bag. shoes: Shoes. hat: Hat.

body_params.name: return_form
body_params.label: return_form
body_params.desc: Specify the desired image format for the output. whiteBK: Returns an image with a white background. mask: Returns a single-channel mask. If not specified, a four-channel PNG image will be returned.

response_fields.name: data
response_fields.desc: The content of the result data returned.

response_fields.name: image_url
response_fields.desc: Returns the keying result image URL address.

response_fields.name: class_url
response_fields.desc: Return the URL corresponding to the clothing category based on the input cloth_class.

body_params.name: return_form
body_params.label: return_form
body_params.desc: Specifies the form of the returned image. If not set, the four-channel PNG map is returned. mask: Returns a single channel mask. whiteBK: Return to white background image. crop: Returns the four-channel PNG image after cropping (cropping out the blank areas around the edges).

response_fields.name: data
response_fields.desc: The content of the result data returned.

query_params.name: job_id
query_params.label: job_id
query_params.desc: The request_id returned by the asynchronous API.

query_params.name: type
query_params.label: type
query_params.desc: Asynchronous task type. HD_COLOUR_MIGRATION: HD Color Migration GENERATE_CARTOONIZED_IMAGE: AI Cartoon Generator

body_params.name: custom_prompt
body_params.label: custom_prompt
body_params.desc: Prompt Content (English only). Please limit the prompt content to 100 English words or fewer. Any content beyond this limit may have minimal impact on the generated result. Use standard vocabulary to avoid failing the review process.

body_params.name: steps
body_params.label: steps
body_params.desc: Sampling steps determine the level of detail in the generated image. A higher value may result in better quality, but it will significantly increase the processing time.

body_params.name: strength
body_params.label: strength
body_params.desc: The smaller the value, the closer it is to the original image.

body_params.name: scale
body_params.label: scale
body_params.desc: The degree to which the text description influences the output.

body_params.name: seed
body_params.label: seed
body_params.desc: Random seed, used as the basis for determining the initial state of the diffusion process. It must be a non-negative number (-1 represents a random seed). If the random seed is the same positive integer and all other parameters are identical, the generated image will most likely be consistent.

body_params.name: max_height
body_params.label: max_height
body_params.desc: Maximum output height. Resized to the specified dimensions as a fallback after the image expansion process.

body_params.name: max_width
body_params.label: max_width
body_params.desc: Maximum output width. Resized to the specified dimensions as a fallback after the image expansion process.

body_params.name: image
body_params.label: image
body_params.desc: Original image.

body_params.name: top
body_params.label: top
body_params.desc: Upward expansion ratio.

body_params.name: bottom
body_params.label: bottom
body_params.desc: Downward expansion ratio.

body_params.name: left
body_params.label: left
body_params.desc: Leftward expansion ratio.

body_params.name: right
body_params.label: right
body_params.desc: Rightward expansion ratio.

body_params.name: mask
body_params.label: mask
body_params.desc: Mask image.

response_fields.name: data
response_fields.desc: The content of the result data returned.

response_fields.name: binary_data_base64
response_fields.desc: Output the processed image as a Base64 array (single image).

response_fields.name: height

response_fields.name: y

response_fields.name: x

body_params.name: function_type
body_params.label: function_type
body_params.desc: Specifies the calling function. encode_pic: Add image watermark using the old model. encode_pic_plus: Add image watermark with new version model 1. encode_pic_bold: Add image watermark with new version model 2. decode_pic: Use the old model to decode the image watermark in the image. decode_pic_plus: Use the new version Model 1 to decode the image watermark in the image. decode_pic_bold: Use the new version Model 2 to decode the image watermark in the image.

body_params.name: origin_image
body_params.label: origin_image
body_params.desc: Original image.

body_params.name: logo

body_params.label: watermark_image

body_params.name: output_file_type
body_params.label: output_file_type
body_params.desc: Output format.

body_params.name: quality_factor
body_params.label: quality_factor
body_params.desc: Quality factor for jpg output.

response_fields.name: data
response_fields.desc: The content of the result data returned.

response_fields.name: watermark_image_url
response_fields.desc: The URL address after adding the watermark.

body_params.name: function_type
body_params.label: function_type
body_params.desc: Specifies the calling function. encode_text: Add text watermark using the old version model. encode_text_plus: Add text watermark using the new version model 1. encode_text_bold: Add text watermark using the new version model 2. decode_text: Use the old model to decode the text watermark in the image. decode_text_plus: Use the new version of Model 1 to decode text watermarks in images. decode_text_bold: Use the new version Model 2 to decode the image watermark in the image.

body_params.name: mask

body_params.name: steps
body_params.label: steps
body_params.desc: Sampling steps determine the level of detail in the generated image. A higher value may result in better quality, but it will significantly increase the processing time.

body_params.name: strength
body_params.label: strength
body_params.desc: The smaller the value, the closer it is to the original image.

body_params.name: scale
body_params.label: scale
body_params.desc: The degree to which the text description influences the output.

body_params.name: seed
body_params.label: seed
body_params.desc: Random seed, used as the basis for determining the initial state of the diffusion process. It must be a non-negative number (-1 represents a random seed). If the random seed is the same positive integer and all other parameters are identical, the generated image will most likely be consistent.

body_params.name: dilate_size
body_params.label: dilate_size
body_params.desc: Mask Dilation Radius. The mask used for object removal should fully encompass the target object. When users manually draw the mask, it often extends beyond the object's boundary. However, if the mask is generated by a segmentation algorithm, it typically adheres closely to the object's edges, which might leave parts of the object uncovered. This can lead to incomplete removal or unexpected artifacts during generation. To avoid such issues, it's recommended to appropriately increase the dilate_size parameter to ensure the mask fully covers the object.

body_params.name: quality
body_params.label: quality
body_params.desc: Quality Parameter. H: High quality — best output quality, but slightly slower processing. M: Medium quality — balanced in both quality and speed. L: Low quality — fastest processing, suitable for scenarios where speed is prioritized.

response_fields.name: data
response_fields.desc: The content of the result data returned.

response_fields.name: binary_data_base64
response_fields.desc: Output the processed image as a Base64 array (single image).

body_params.label: image

body_params.name: task_type
body_params.label: task_type
body_params.desc: Task Type. async: Asynchronous tasks.

body_params.name: type
body_params.label: type
body_params.desc: Style. Range of values

response_fields.name: task_id
response_fields.desc: Asynchronous task ID. **Please use this field when calling the Querying Async Task Results API.**

body_params.name: option
body_params.label: option
body_params.desc: cartoon: Cartoon style. pencil: Pencil style. color_pencil: Color pencil drawing style. warm: The style of colorful sugar cube oil painting. wave: Oil painting style in surfing in Kanagawa. lavender: Lavender oil painting style. mononoke: Strange oil painting style. scream: Scream oil painting style. gothic: Gothic oil painting style.

body_params.name: style
body_params.label: style
body_params.desc: style image.

body_params.name: major
body_params.label: major
body_params.desc: Content image.

response_fields.name: data
response_fields.desc: The content of the result data returned.

response_fields.name: url
response_fields.desc: URL address of the result image for stylization, image format: PNG.

response_fields.name: major_url
response_fields.desc: The result of keeping the portrait unchanged and stylizing the rest. If there is no figure in the input major content map, the empty string is returned here.

body_params.name: output_format
body_params.label: output_format
body_params.desc: The format of the output image.

body_params.name: mode
body_params.label: mode
body_params.desc: Color mixing mode. LogC: Suitable for gray film (low contrast raw map) input, adjust the image color perception substantially to restore the color texture of the SDR domain. Rec709: Suitable for images taken under general conditions, appropriate to enhance the image brightness, saturation, etc., the adjustment range is more conservative. ln17_256: Suitable for images taken under general conditions, drastically adjusts image brightness, saturation, contrast, and improves color quality.

response_fields.name: data
response_fields.desc: The content of the result data returned.

response_fields.name: image_url
response_fields.desc: Returns the URL address of the processed image.

body_params.name: upscale_factor
body_params.label: upscale_factor
body_params.desc: Magnification.

body_params.name: mode
body_params.label: mode
body_params.desc: Image output mode. base: Normal mode, i.e. stable super-resolution effect. enhancement: Enhancement mode, which has a more prominent enhancement effect than the normal mode, further improving the clarity and sharpness of the output image.

body_params.name: output_format
body_params.label: output_format
body_params.desc: Output image format. **Note:** If the input image is in RGBA format, the output will be forced to png to preserve both RGBA format and alpha channel accuracy. If the output image resolution exceeds 3840x2160, the output format will be automatically set to jpg.

body_params.name: output_quality
body_params.label: output_quality
body_params.desc: Quality factor of the output image, where a higher value corresponds to higher quality. Only applicable when output_format=jpg.

response_fields.name: data
response_fields.desc: The content of the result data returned.

response_fields.name: url
response_fields.desc: URL address of the image after resolution enlargement, image format is PNG.

response_fields.name: data
response_fields.desc: The content of the result data returned.

response_fields.name: score
response_fields.desc: The higher the score, the better the composition, with a recommended score of 3.8 or higher being the better composition score.

response_fields.name: data
response_fields.desc: The content of the result data returned.

response_fields.name: exposure
response_fields.desc: Image exposure score, the value range is 0~1. The higher the score, the greater the exposure.

body_params.name: max_face_num
body_params.label: max_face_num
body_params.desc: The maximum number of faces processed. When set to 1, only the largest face in the image is detected. A smaller value leads to faster processing speed.

body_params.name: face_attributes_type
body_params.label: face_attributes_type
body_params.desc: Whether to return attributes such as age, gender, mood, etc. AttributesInfo is returned for up to 5 faces with the largest area, and AttributesInfo for more than 5 faces (the 6th and later faces) are not referenced.

body_params.name: need_rotate_detection
body_params.label: need_rotate_detection
body_params.desc: Whether to enable image rotation recognition support. When the face in the picture is rotated and there is no exif information in the picture, if you don't turn on the picture rotation recognition support, you can't detect and recognize the face in the picture correctly. If you are sure that the picture contains exif information or you are sure that the face in the input picture will not be rotated, please do not turn on this parameter. If this parameter is turned on, the overall time required may increase by hundreds of milliseconds. 0: Close. 1: Open.

response_fields.name: x
response_fields.desc: The horizontal coordinate of the upper left corner of the face frame.The face frame contains the positions of the five senses of the face and expands on them, if the face frame is out of the range of the picture, it will lead to negative coordinates.If you need to intercept the complete face, you can take the negative coordinate to 0 if the complete subcompletess meets the demand.

response_fields.name: y
response_fields.desc: The vertical coordinate of the upper left corner of the face frame. The face frame contains the positions of the five senses of the face and expands them to a certain extent. If the face frame exceeds the range of the picture, it will lead to negative coordinates. If you need to intercept the complete face, you can take the negative coordinate to 0 if the complete subcompletess meets the demand.

response_fields.name: age
response_fields.desc: Age. 65: 65 years old and above. When face_attributes_type does not contain Age or when more than 5 faces are detected, this parameter is still returned but is not informative.

response_fields.name: beauty
response_fields.desc: Beauty Score. When face_attributes_type does not contain Beauty or when more than 5 faces are detected, this parameter is still returned but is not informative.

response_fields.name: emotion
response_fields.desc: Emotional information. When face_attributes_type does not contain Emotion or when more than 5 faces are detected, this parameter is still returned but is not informative.

response_fields.name: type
response_fields.desc: 0: Neutral. 1: Happy. 2: Surprised. 3: Angry. 4: Sad. 5: Disgusted. 6: Fearful.

response_fields.name: eye
response_fields.desc: Eye-related information. face_attributes_type does not contain Eye or when more than 5 faces are detected, this parameter is still returned but is not informative.

response_fields.name: type
response_fields.desc: 0: Small eyes. 1: Regular eyes. 2: Large eyes.

response_fields.name: eyebrow
response_fields.desc: Eyebrow information. face_attributes_type does not contain Eyebrow or when more than 5 faces are detected, this parameter is still returned but is not informative.

response_fields.name: gender
response_fields.desc: Gender information. face_attributes_type does not contain Gender or when more than 5 faces are detected, this parameter is still returned but is not informative.

response_fields.name: hair
response_fields.desc: Hair information. face_attributes_type does not contain Hair or when more than 5 faces are detected, this parameter is still returned but is not informative.

response_fields.name: type
response_fields.desc: 0: Bald. 1: Short hair. 2: Medium-length hair. 3: Long hair. 4: Tied hair.

response_fields.name: hat
response_fields.desc: Hat information. face_attributes_type does not contain Hat or when more than 5 faces are detected, this parameter is still returned but is not informative.

response_fields.name: type
response_fields.desc: 0: No hat. 1: Regular hat. 2: Helmet. 3: Security hat.

response_fields.name: type
response_fields.desc: 0: No hat. 1: Red shades. 2: Yellow shades. 3: Blue shades. 4: Black shades. 5: Gray/White shades. 6: Mixed colors.

response_fields.name: head_pose
response_fields.desc: Face offset information. face_attributes_type does not contain HeadPose or when more than 5 faces are detected, this parameter is still returned but is not informative.

response_fields.name: mask
response_fields.desc: Mask wearing information. face_attributes_type does not contain Mask or when more than 5 faces are detected, this parameter is still returned but is not informative.

response_fields.name: type
response_fields.desc: 0: No mask. 1: Mask without covering face. 2: Mask covering chin. 3: Mask covering mouth. 4: Correctly worn mask.

response_fields.name: mouth
response_fields.desc: Mouth information. face_attributes_type does not contain Mouth or when more than 5 faces are detected, this parameter is still returned but is not informative.

response_fields.name: moustache
response_fields.desc: Facial hair information. face_attributes_type does not contain Moustache or when more than 5 faces are detected, this parameter is still returned but is not informative.

response_fields.name: nose
response_fields.desc: Nose information. face_attributes_type does not contain Nose or when more than 5 faces are detected, this parameter is still returned but is not informative.

response_fields.name: type
response_fields.desc: 0: Upturned nose. 1: Hooked nose. 2: Normal. 3: Round-tipped nose.

response_fields.name: shape
response_fields.desc: Face shape information. face_attributes_type does not contain Shape or when more than 5 faces are detected, this parameter is still returned but is not informative.

response_fields.name: type
response_fields.desc: 0: Square face. 1: Triangular face. 2: Oval face. 3: Heart-shaped face. 4: Round face.

response_fields.name: skin
response_fields.desc: Skin color information. face_attributes_type does not contain Skin or when more than 5 faces are detected, this parameter is still returned but is not informative.

response_fields.name: type
response_fields.desc: 0: Yellow skin. 1: Brown skin. 2: Black skin. 3: White skin.

response_fields.name: smile
response_fields.desc: Smile Rating. face_attributes_type does not contain Smile or when more than 5 faces are detected, this parameter is still returned but is not informative.

response_fields.name: pupils
response_fields.desc: The center point coordinates and radius of the left and right pupils, with 6 floating-point values per face, in the order of [left_iris_cenpt.x, left_iris_cenpt.y, left_iris_radius, right_iris_cenpt.x, right_iris_cenpt.y, right_iris_radius]. If multiple faces are detected, results are returned in order.

response_fields.name: gender_list
response_fields.desc: Gender. If multiple faces are detected, results are returned in order. 0: Female. 1: Male.

response_fields.name: expressions
response_fields.desc: Expression. If multiple faces are detected, results are returned in order. 0: Neutral. 1: Smile.

response_fields.name: landmarks
response_fields.desc: Facial landmark detection results. A set of landmark coordinates is returned for each face, represented as (x0, y0, x1, y1, …). If multiple faces are detected, results are returned in order.

response_fields.name: landmark_count
response_fields.desc: Number of facial landmarks. distributed as follows: Eyebrows: 24 points Eyes: 32 points Nose: 6 points Mouth: 34 points Outer contour: 9 points

response_fields.name: beauty_list
response_fields.desc: Attractiveness score. A higher score indicates a higher level of attractiveness. If multiple faces are detected, results are returned in order.

response_fields.name: hat_list
response_fields.desc: Whether wearing a hat. If multiple faces are detected, results are returned in order. 0: No. 1: Yes.

response_fields.name: face_probability_list
response_fields.desc: Probability of a face. If multiple faces are detected, results are returned in order.

response_fields.name: glasses
response_fields.desc: Whether wearing glasses. If multiple faces are detected, results are returned in order. 0: No glasses. 1: Wearing regular glasses. 2: Wearing sunglasses.

response_fields.name: face_rectangles
response_fields.desc: Face bounding box, represented as [left, top, width, height]. If multiple faces are detected, results are returned in order.

response_fields.name: pose_list
response_fields.desc: Face pose, in the format [yaw, pitch, roll]. If multiple faces are detected, results are returned in order. yaw: left-right angle. Range: [-90, 90]. pitch: up-down angle. Range: [-90, 90]. roll: in-plane rotation angle. Range: [-180, 180].

response_fields.name: age_list
response_fields.desc: Age. If multiple faces are detected, results are returned in order.

response_fields.name: dense_feature_length
response_fields.desc: The feature dimension returned by face recognition.

response_fields.name: masks
response_fields.desc: Whether wearing a mask. If multiple faces are detected, results are returned in order. 0: No. 1: Yes. 2: Mask worn incorrectly.

response_fields.name: qualities
response_fields.desc: Face quality score, where a higher score indicates better suitability for recognition.

response_fields.name: score_list
response_fields.desc: Overall quality score, where a higher score indicates better suitability for recognition. It is recommended to set a threshold of ≥85 during recognition: a score above 85 indicates high overall image quality, while a score below 85 indicates lower overall image quality. If multiple faces are detected, results are returned in order.

response_fields.name: blur_list
response_fields.desc: Face blur score indicating the impact of blurriness on recognition, where a higher score is more favorable for recognition. It is recommended to set a threshold of ≥85 during recognition: a score above 85 indicates a lower likelihood of the image being blurry, while a score below 85 indicates a higher likelihood of blurriness. If multiple faces are detected, results are returned in order.

response_fields.name: fnf_list
response_fields.desc: Score indicating whether the target is a face and its impact on recognition, where a higher score is more favorable for recognition. It is recommended to set a threshold of ≥85 during recognition: a score above 85 indicates a higher probability that the image is a face, while a score below 85 indicates a lower probability. If multiple faces are detected, results are returned in order.

response_fields.name: glass_list
response_fields.desc: Score indicating the impact of upper-face occlusion (e.g., glasses) on recognition, where a higher score is more favorable for recognition. It is recommended to set a threshold of ≥85 during recognition: a score above 85 indicates a lower probability of wearing glasses, while a score below 85 indicates a higher probability. If multiple faces are detected, results are returned in order.

response_fields.name: illu_list
response_fields.desc: Score indicating the impact of lighting on recognition, where a higher score is more favorable for recognition. It is recommended to set a threshold of ≥85 during recognition: a score above 85 indicates a higher probability that the image has good lighting, while a score below 85 indicates a lower probability. If multiple faces are detected, results are returned in order.

response_fields.name: mask_list
response_fields.desc: Score indicating the impact of lower-face occlusion (e.g., mask) on recognition, where a higher score is more favorable for recognition. It is recommended to set a threshold of ≥85 during recognition: a score above 85 indicates a lower probability of wearing a mask, while a score below 85 indicates a higher probability. If multiple faces are detected, results are returned in order.

response_fields.name: noise_list
response_fields.desc: Score indicating the impact of image noise on recognition, where a higher score is more favorable for recognition. It is recommended to set a threshold of ≥85 during recognition: a score above 85 indicates a lower probability of image noise, while a score below 85 indicates a higher probability. If multiple faces are detected, results are returned in order.

response_fields.name: pose_list
response_fields.desc: Score indicating the impact of face pose on recognition, where a higher score is more favorable for recognition. It is recommended to set a threshold of ≥85 during recognition: a score above 85 indicates a higher probability of the face being frontal, while a score below 85 indicates a lower probability. If multiple faces are detected, results are returned in order.

body_params.name: max_face_num
body_params.label: max_face_num
body_params.desc: The maximum number of faces to process. The default value is 1 (only the face with the largest area in the image is detected).

body_params.name: face_field
body_params.label: face_field
body_params.desc: Returns more information about the face (by default only face_token, face frame, probability and rotation angle are returned). age: Age information. gender: Gender information. landmark4: 4 feature points. landmark72: 72 feature points. landmark150: 150 feature points. landmark201: 201 feature points.

body_params.name: action_type
body_params.label: action_type
body_params.desc: Face editing method. TO_KID: V1 version becomes a child. TO_OLD: V1 version becomes old man. TO_FEMALE: V1 version becomes girls. TO_MALE: V1 version becomes boys. V2_AGE: V2 version age change. V2_GENDER: v2 version gender shift.

body_params.name: quality_control
body_params.label: quality_control
body_params.desc: Image quality (image field image quality). Please select the appropriate option based on quality information such as masking, lighting, blurriness, and integrity of the face. If selecting a higher quality causes the image to be unprocessable, please select a lower quality to try. NONE: No control is performed. LOW: Lower quality requirements. NORMAL: General quality requirements. HIGH: Higher quality requirements. More Details

body_params.name: face_location
body_params.label: face_location
body_params.desc: When multiple faces are detected in the image, use this parameter to specify the position of the face to be edited in the image, or default to the largest face in the image if not specified. More Details

body_params.name: mask
body_params.label: mask
body_params.desc: Masked Image. If left blank, a masked image will be generated automatically. The white portion of the masked image is the editable area, while the black portion remains unchanged. For example, by using the white area of the mask to cover a person's face, the face will remain unaltered, and other parts will be generated automatically.

body_params.name: bangs
body_params.label: bangs
body_params.desc: Whether to add bangs to the resulting image. This parameter is ineffective when the hairstyle has no bangs or when bangs are mandatory. Parameter Validity Explanation 0: No. 1: Yes. Parameter Effect Comparison

body_params.name: mode
body_params.label: mode
body_params.desc: Generation mode. Please enable this parameter based on the original hairstyle. 1: Head-only mode. More suitable for short hair. 2: Full-image generation mode. More suitable for long hair; use this mode when the original image features shoulder-length or longer hair. Parameter Effect Comparison

body_params.name: reference
body_params.label: reference
body_params.desc: Reference Original Hairstyle. Enabling this parameter will make changes to the hairstyle based on the original hairstyle, resulting in minor alterations. Please do not enable this parameter if changing from short hair to long hair or from long hair to short hair. 0: No. 1: Yes. Parameter Effect Comparison

response_fields.desc: Asynchronous task ID. **Please use this field when calling the Querying Async Task Results API.**

body_params.desc: Lip Color Info. You can enter up to 3 lip_color_info to enable changing the lip color for up to 3 faces in a graph. Description

body_params.name: type
body_params.label: type
body_params.desc: Cartoon effect. pixar: Pixar pixar_plus: Pixar Pro 3d_cartoon: 3D cartoon angel: Angel angel_plus: Angel Pro demon: Demon ukiyoe_cartoon: Ukiyo-e amcartoon: American Manga western: Western avatar: Avatar jpcartoon: Japanese Manga (I) jpcartoon_head: Japanese Manga (portrait) hkcartoon: China Comics classic_cartoon: Retro Cartoon tccartoon: Moe Manga anime: Japanese Manga (II) handdrawn: hand-painted sketch: Pencil drawing (I) artstyle: Artistic effects head: Pencil drawing (head) full: Pencil drawing (II) 3d_game: 3D game effects

response_fields.name: data
response_fields.desc: The content of the result data returned.

body_params.name: multi_face
body_params.label: multi_face
body_params.desc: Multiple-face beauty strategy. When set to 1, beauty enhancement is applied to all faces (it is recommended that the number of faces in the image be less than 18, as too many faces may lead to instability). When set to any other value or not specified, only the largest face is processed.

body_params.name: beauty_level
body_params.label: beauty_level
body_params.desc: Beauty level.

body_params.name: task_type
body_params.label: task_type
body_params.desc: Task Type. sync: Synchronous tasks.

response_fields.name: data
response_fields.desc: The content of the result data returned.

response_fields.name: image
response_fields.desc: The result image, returning the Base64 encoding of the image.

body_params.name: slim_degree
body_params.label: slim_degree
body_params.desc: Standard strength. The higher the value, the more pronounced the face slimming effect.

response_fields.name: data
response_fields.desc: The content of the result data returned.

body_params.name: retouch_degree
body_params.label: retouch_degree
body_params.desc: Dermabrasion intensity. The higher the value, the less visible the skin texture.

body_params.name: whitening_degree
body_params.label: whitening_degree
body_params.desc: Whitening strength. The higher the value, the whiter the skin.

response_fields.name: data
response_fields.desc: The content of the result data returned.

body_params.name: task_type
body_params.label: task_type
body_params.desc: Task Type. async: Asynchronous tasks.

body_params.name: person_image
body_params.label: person_image
body_params.desc: Model image for calling the Try on Clothes API.

body_params.name: top_garment
body_params.label: top_garment
body_params.desc: Top clothing image for calling the Try on Clothes API.

body_params.name: coarse_image
body_params.label: coarse_image
body_params.desc: Result image obtained from calling the Try on Clothes API.

body_params.name: gender
body_params.label: gender
body_params.desc: Gender of the person_image. woman: Female. man: Male.

body_params.name: bottom_garment
body_params.label: bottom_garment
body_params.desc: Bottom clothing image for calling the Try on Clothes API.

response_fields.name: task_id
response_fields.desc: Asynchronous task ID. **Please use this field when calling the Querying Async Task Results API.**
